title: Senior Doctor - Tata Memorial Centre Ventures Solutions - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Tata Memorial Centre Ventures Solutions - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Doctor looking for your next big career move? Tata Memorial Centre Ventures Solutions in Dhanbad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Tata Memorial Centre Ventures Solutions:
Tata Memorial Centre Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in ICU Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Memorial Centre Ventures Solutions!
